questionHtml:
What is the relative atomic mass of a sample of chlorine containing 70 % of the 35Cl isotope and 30 % of the 37Cl isotope?

A.  35.4

B.  35.5

C.  35.6

D.  35.7

meta.title: What is the relative atomic mass of a sample of chlorine containing 70 % of the 35Cl isotope and 30 % of the 37Cl isotope? A. 35.4 B. 35.5 C. 35.6 D. 35.7
